skill.timberfelling.name: Timberfelling
skill.timberfelling.description: Felling pines and oaks for raw timber.
skill.prospecting.name: Prospecting
skill.prospecting.description: Digging ore and quarrying stone from the high slopes.
skill.herbalism.name: Herbalism
skill.herbalism.description: Gathering wild greens and rare blooms.
skill.trapping.name: Trapping
skill.trapping.description: Snaring small game and stalking elk for hides.
skill.shorefishing.name: Shorefishing
skill.shorefishing.description: Working lines and pots along the cold shore.
skill.sawmilling.name: Sawmilling
skill.sawmilling.description: Sawing raw timber into usable planks.
skill.smelting.name: Smelting
skill.smelting.description: Firing ore into clean metal bars.
skill.tanning.name: Tanning
skill.threadwork.name: Threadwork
skill.stonemasonry.name: Stonemasonry
skill.stonemasonry.description: Dressing rough stone into true blocks.
skill.bladecraft.name: Bladecraft
skill.armorcraft.name: Armorcraft
skill.tinkering.name: Tinkering
skill.gemwright.name: Gemwright
skill.gemwright.description: Cutting stones and setting fine rings.
skill.alchemy.name: Alchemy
skill.alchemy.description: Brewing tonics from herb and tide.
skill.cookery.name: Cookery
skill.cookery.description: Smoking, salting, and preparing hearty fare.
skill.joinery.name: Joinery
skill.joinery.description: Building sturdy furniture from plank and block.
skill.hauling.name: Hauling
skill.hauling.description: Running caravans between settlements; grows with every delivered shipment.
